title: Chelqath #2521
definition:
Helkath-hazzurim = "field of swords"

 1) a place near the pool of Gibeon where Ishbosheth's men were killed
    by David's men under Joab
nasbUsage:

 1) a place near the pool of Gibeon where Ishbosheth's men were killed
    by David's men under Joab
